name: Immich
description: High-performance photo and video backup solution
compose:
name: slashnode-immich
services:
  server:
    image: ghcr.io/immich-app/immich-server:v2.7.5
    container_name: immich-server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - redis
      - postgres
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: production
      DB_HOSTNAME: immich-postgres
      DB_USERNAME: immich
      DB_PASSWORD: moneyprintergobrrr
      DB_DATABASE_NAME: immich
      REDIS_HOSTNAME: immich-redis
      LOG_LEVEL: log
      JWT_SECRET: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      DISABLE_REVERSE_GEOCODING: 'false'
      REVERSE_GEOCODING_PRECISION: '3'
      PUBLIC_LOGIN_PAGE_MESSAGE: ''
      IMMICH_MACHINE_LEARNING_URL: http://immich-machine-learning:3003
    volumes:
      - server_data-upload:/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:2283:2283
  machine-learning:
    image: ghcr.io/immich-app/immich-machine-learning:v2.7.5
    container_name: immich-machine-learning
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: production
      DB_HOSTNAME: immich-postgres
      DB_USERNAME: immich
      DB_PASSWORD: moneyprintergobrrr
      DB_DATABASE_NAME: immich
      REDIS_HOSTNAME: immich-redis
      LOG_LEVEL: log
      JWT_SECRET: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      DISABLE_REVERSE_GEOCODING: 'false'
      REVERSE_GEOCODING_PRECISION: '3'
      PUBLIC_LOGIN_PAGE_MESSAGE: ''
      IMMICH_MACHINE_LEARNING_URL: http://immich-machine-learning:3003
    volumes:
      - machine-learning_data-model-cache:/cache
  redis:
    image: valkey/valkey:8-bookworm
    container_name: immich-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - redis_data-redis:/data
  postgres:
    image: ghcr.io/immich-app/postgres:14-vectorchord0.4.3-pgvectors0.2.0
    container_name: immich-postgres
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: production
      DB_HOSTNAME: immich-postgres
      DB_USERNAME: immich
      DB_PASSWORD: moneyprintergobrrr
      DB_DATABASE_NAME: immich
      REDIS_HOSTNAME: immich-redis
      LOG_LEVEL: log
      JWT_SECRET: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      DISABLE_REVERSE_GEOCODING: 'false'
      REVERSE_GEOCODING_PRECISION: '3'
      PUBLIC_LOGIN_PAGE_MESSAGE: ''
      IMMICH_MACHINE_LEARNING_URL: http://immich-machine-learning:3003
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: moneyprintergobrrr
      POSTGRES_USER: immich
      POSTGRES_DB: immich
      POSTGRES_INITDB_ARGS: '--data-checksums'
    volumes:
      - postgres_data-postgres:/var/lib/postgresql/data
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-upload:
    name: slashnode-immich_server_data-upload
  machine-learning_data-model-cache:
    name: slashnode-immich_machine-learning_data-model-cache
  redis_data-redis:
    name: slashnode-immich_redis_data-redis
  postgres_data-postgres:
    name: slashnode-immich_postgres_data-postgres
